questions.hint: Look up! (Unless you're doing this at night, in which case go to bed.)

questions.prompt: What is the third letter of the Greek alphabet?
questions.answer: It's \\(\gamma\\), which is the third letter of the Greek alphabet.

questions.prompt: What is the value of π (pi)?
Is this chart about radiative forcings or climate feedbacks?
questions.answer: It's forcings, shown on the x-axis

image.alt: Sample forcing chart used to demonstrate image questions
image.caption: Images stay inside the question box and keep their proportions.

questions.prompt: This sample shows a multi-part question.
questions.answer: Part (a) the prompt is split into separate subquestions. Part (b) \\(2^3 + 1 = 9\\).

parts.prompt: Write one short sentence explaining what makes a question multi-part.
parts.label: (a)
parts.answer: A multi-part question has two or more subquestions that are answered separately.
